brand.title: The Quinfall Wiki
brand.tagline: Step into the world of Quinfall

search.placeholder: Search pages, items, bosses, dungeons, zones…
search.hint1: Type a page, item, boss, dungeon or zone name
search.hint2: ↑ ↓ to navigate, Enter to open, Esc to close

guide.summary: Step-by-step roadmap from zero to Lvl 100 — tutorial, build choice, guild entry, post-50 grind.

classes.summary: 10 weapon families and 20 sub-classes — no class lock, swap weapons to swap classes.

crafting.summary: Harvester, miner, lumberjack, cook, blacksmith, tailor, alchemist — 13 professions, 700+ recipes.

dungeons.summary: 4 active dungeons, 8 world bosses, 4 difficulty tiers — from Foaming Catacombs to the Kraken.

items.summary: Ores, plants, essences, gear sets — 1900+ entry searchable database.

craftCalc.summary: Cost / profit calc, material chains and farming plans — the endgame economy tool.

mounts.summary: Horses are tamed (green/blue) and bred (purple/orange); donkey, ox, camel, elephant rented for caravans.

sailing.summary: 4 ship classes × 2 factions, 7 harbours, naval combat and the Kraken three times a day.

caravan.summary: Trade between 12 major cities — Caravan Vendor rentals, packages, +20% PvP-channel bonus.

leveling.summary: Town Board ×2 XP, statue +40% buff, Lvl 75-90 group zone — the endgame progression route.

gallery.summary: Screenshots, scenes, kraken fights and city skylines.

system.summary: System requirements, performance settings and low-PC optimisation.

updates.summary: Game patches, hotfixes and major updates pulled live from Steam.

studio.summary: Vawraek Technology — developer, patch notes, roadmap and company history.

contact.summary: Community links, Discord, feedback and contribution channels.
